dissolveDelay.description: Longer dissolve delays earn higher rewards.

processing.description: Creating your neuron and staking your ICPs

success.title: Neuron Created!
success.descriptionLocked: Your neuron is locked and earning rewards.

infoBoxes.whatIsStaking: Staking your ICP creates a neuron that earns voting rewards. You can earn up to ~12.6% APY depending on your lock period and participation.
infoBoxes.dissolveDelayWarning: The lock period can only be increased, never decreased. The countdown only begins when you start unlocking.
infoBoxes.lockedVsUnlocking:
Locked: Neuron stays locked, earning maximum rewards. Start unlocking later when you want to withdraw.
Unlocking: Countdown begins immediately. After the lock period, you can withdraw your ICP.

errors.amountTooLow: Amount must be greater than the transaction fee ({{fee}} ICP)
